## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Series A announcement planned for next week or the following, expecting increased applications and inbound interest](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Focus on improving customer retention and sales process to reduce churn](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

  - [Shift to async stand-ups and new project management tools (Linear) coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Topics

### Series A Announcement and Impact

  - [Announcement planned for next week or early the following week (around the 15th)](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Expecting spike in job applications and inbound sales deals](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [PR, blogs, and Moderna posting planned](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Main benefit: Boosting brand visibility and attracting engineering candidates](https://fathom.video/share/DyBZfBfyixcrHE5y-QFPsuTT22gv7zmr?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Customer Retention and Sales Process
